capstones.title: Galois solvability of polynomials
capstones.blurb: A polynomial is solvable by radicals iff its Galois group is a solvable group — why the quintic resists closed-form roots and the cubic/quartic don't.

capstones.title: Yoneda, limits, and adjunctions
capstones.blurb: An object is what it does to every other object. Yoneda + limits + adjunctions is the categorical core that every downstream subject silently uses.

capstones.title: Master the residue theorem
capstones.blurb: Integrate $f$ around a closed contour by summing residues at its poles. The algorithmic heart of complex analysis.

capstones.title: Prove the Riemann mapping theorem
capstones.blurb: Every simply connected proper open $U\subset\mathbb{C}$ is conformally the disk. Needs Schwarz, Möbius, Montel.

capstones.title: Complex-analytic proof of the FTA
capstones.blurb: Liouville gives the one-page proof: a bounded entire function is constant.

capstones.title: Locate zeros with Rouché
capstones.blurb: Count zeros of holomorphic functions by perturbation. Foundation for the argument-principle toolkit.

capstones.title: The spectral theorem
capstones.blurb: Every self-adjoint operator on a Hilbert space is a multiplication operator in disguise — the infinite-dimensional eigenbasis that powers quantum mechanics and PDE.

capstones.title: Gelfand–Naimark duality
capstones.blurb: Commutative unital $C^*$-algebras are the same thing as compact Hausdorff spaces. Noncommutative algebras become noncommutative topology.

capstones.title: Stokes & de Rham cohomology
capstones.blurb: $\int_{\partial M}\omega = \int_M d\omega$ unifies FTC, Green, Gauss, Stokes. De Rham cohomology turns the failure of $d\omega=0\Rightarrow\omega=d\eta$ into a topological invariant.

capstones.title: Riemann–Roch on a Riemann surface
capstones.blurb: $\ell(D) - \ell(K-D) = \deg D - g + 1$. Topology ($g$), analysis (meromorphic sections), and algebra (divisors) meet in one formula.

capstones.title: Gauss–Bonnet theorem
capstones.blurb: $\int_M K\,dA = 2\pi\chi(M)$. Local curvature integrates to a purely topological invariant — the first great bridge between differential geometry and algebraic topology.

capstones.title: Gauss's quadratic reciprocity
capstones.blurb: For odd primes $p\ne q$: $\left(\tfrac{p}{q}\right)\left(\tfrac{q}{p}\right) = (-1)^{\frac{p-1}{2}\frac{q-1}{2}}$. The first nontrivial reciprocity law; blueprint for everything after.

capstones.title: The Hasse local–global principle
capstones.blurb: A quadratic form has a rational solution iff it has one over every $\mathbb{Q}_p$ and $\mathbb{R}$. The principle — and its failures — drive modern arithmetic.

capstones.title: The Hilbert class field
capstones.blurb: Every number field $K$ has a maximal unramified abelian extension $H/K$ whose Galois group is the class group of $K$. Class field theory's first visible miracle.

capstones.title: Sato–Tate equidistribution
capstones.blurb: Frobenius angles $\theta_p$ of a non-CM elliptic curve equidistribute with respect to the semicircular measure $(2/\pi)\sin^2\theta\,d\theta$.

capstones.title: Birch & Swinnerton-Dyer
capstones.blurb: $\mathrm{ord}_{s=1} L(E,s) = \mathrm{rank}\, E(\mathbb{Q})$. One of the Clay Millennium problems, tying an analytic quantity to Mordell–Weil rank.

capstones.title: Modularity and Fermat's Last Theorem
capstones.blurb: Frey + Ribet + Wiles: a solution to $a^p+b^p=c^p$ would give a newform of level $2$, but $S_2(\Gamma_0(2))=0$ — contradiction.

capstones.title: Riemann's functional equation
capstones.blurb: $\xi(s) = \xi(1-s)$, where $\xi(s) = \pi^{-s/2}\Gamma(s/2)\zeta(s)$. Mellin + theta gives analytic continuation and the symmetry about $\Re(s) = 1/2$.

capstones.title: Monstrous moonshine (Borcherds)
capstones.blurb: Fourier coefficients of $j(\tau)$ are sums of Monster irrep dimensions. Borcherds' Fields-medal proof via a generalized Kac–Moody Lie algebra and replication formulas.

capstones.title: Ramanujan congruences for p(n)
capstones.blurb: $p(5n+4)\equiv 0\pmod 5$, $p(7n+5)\equiv 0\pmod 7$, $p(11n+6)\equiv 0\pmod{11}$. Explained by the modularity of Dedekind $\eta$.

capstones.title: Weil conjectures via étale cohomology
capstones.blurb: Point counts over $\mathbb{F}_q$ as an alternating sum of Frobenius traces on $\ell$-adic cohomology, with eigenvalues pinned by Deligne.

capstones.title: Moduli of higher-genus curves
capstones.blurb: $\overline{\mathcal{M}}_g$ — the Deligne–Mumford compactification via stable curves. Automorphisms force a stack, not a scheme; dimension $3g-3$ for $g\ge 2$.

capstones.title: $\infty$-topoi (Lurie's higher topos theory)
capstones.blurb: An $\infty$-topos is an accessible left-exact localization of a presheaf $\infty$-topos $\mathcal{P}(C) = \mathrm{Fun}(C^{\mathrm{op}}, \mathcal{S})$. The $\infty$-Giraud axioms characterize them intrinsically; their internal logic is homotopy type theory; their geometric examples (étale, pro-étale) are the home of derived algebraic geometry.
